pr.title: WIP: Depth Recurrence — val_bpb 3.2134 (beats baseline by 0.014 BPB at 2.8x fewer params)

output.summary: Shares a small set of transformer blocks across repeated iterations with learned iteration conditioning and U-Net style skips to reach 20+ effective layers.
techniques: weight-shared transformer blocks recur multiple times
learned iteration embeddings with sigmoid gating
U-Net-style skip connections for recurrent depth
